creator: dmitry.wagin@ya.ru
text:
How to reproduce:


Add to rc.conf:
iovctl_files="/etc/iov/mlx5_core0.conf"


/etc/iov/mlx5_core0.conf:
PF {
     device: "mlx5_core0";
     num_vfs: 8;
}

DEFAULT {
     passthrough: true;
}


network configuration:
kldload carp
ifconfig mce0 inet 192.168.1.4/24 up
ifconfig mce0 inet 192.168.1.70/32 alias vhid 70 advskew 100 pass qweasdzxc


cat /var/log/messages:
<6>1 2023-05-23T13:26:04.687203+00:00 alpha04 kernel - - - carp: 70@mce1: BACKUP -> MASTER (master timed out)
